name: spring-boot-event-driven-patterns
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides Event-Driven Architecture (EDA) patterns in Spring Boot using ApplicationEvent, @EventListener, and Kafka. Use when building loosely-coupled microservices with domain events, transactional event listeners, and distributed messaging patterns.
description_zh: 一份全面实用的Spring Boot事件驱动架构实现指南，涵盖核心模式，提供清晰示例和现代依赖项。
_original_description: A comprehensive and practical guide for implementing Event-Driven Architecture in Spring Boot, covering core patterns with clear examples and modern dependencies.

name: spring-boot-openapi-documentation
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides patterns to generate comprehensive REST API documentation using SpringDoc OpenAPI 3.0 and Swagger UI in Spring Boot 3.x applications. Use when setting up API documentation, configuring Swagger UI, adding OpenAPI annotations, implementing security documentation, or enhancing REST endpoints with examples and schemas.
description_zh: 该技能为在Spring Boot 3.x应用中集成SpringDoc OpenAPI 3.0和Swagger UI提供详细指导。涵盖依赖配置、注解使用、API文档生成、安全方案和验证约束的文档化，以及最佳实践。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed guidance for integrating SpringDoc OpenAPI 3.0 and Swagger UI into Spring Boot 3.x applications. It covers dependency setup, configuration examples, annotation usage, and best practices for documenting REST APIs with request/response models, security schemes, and validation constraints.

name: spring-boot-resilience4j
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: This skill should be used when implementing fault tolerance and resilience patterns in Spring Boot applications using the Resilience4j library. Apply this skill to add circuit breaker, retry, rate limiter, bulkhead, time limiter, and fallback mechanisms to prevent cascading failures, handle transient errors, and manage external service dependencies gracefully in microservices architectures.
description_zh: 一份全面实用的Spring Boot Resilience4j实现指南，包含清晰的示例和配置细节，适合微服务架构开发。
_original_description: A comprehensive and practical guide for implementing Resilience4j patterns in Spring Boot applications with clear examples and configuration details.

name: spring-boot-rest-api-standards
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides REST API design standards and best practices for Spring Boot projects. Use when creating or reviewing REST endpoints, DTOs, error handling, pagination, security headers, HATEOAS and architecture patterns.
description_zh: 该技能为使用Spring Boot构建REST API提供具体模式。涵盖URL设计、HTTP方法、状态码、DTO、验证、错误处理和分页。包含控制器、DTO和全局异常处理器的即用型Java代码示例。重点在于将API契约与领域模型分离，并应用一致的架构分层。
_original_description: This skill provides concrete patterns for building REST APIs with Spring Boot. It covers URL design, HTTP methods, status codes, DTOs, validation, error handling, and pagination. Includes ready-to-use Java code examples for controllers, DTOs, and global exception handlers. Focuses on separating API contracts from domain models and applying consistent architectural layers.

name: spring-boot-saga-pattern
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides distributed transaction patterns using the Saga Pattern in Spring Boot microservices. Use when building microservices requiring transaction management across multiple services, handling compensating transactions, ensuring eventual consistency, or implementing choreography or orchestration-based sagas with Spring Boot, Kafka, or Axon Framework.
description_zh: 一份全面且结构清晰的指南，用于在Spring Boot微服务中实现Saga模式，涵盖了编排和协同两种方法，并提供了实用的考量。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured guide for implementing the Saga Pattern in Spring Boot microservices, covering both choreography and orchestration approaches with practical considerations.

name: spring-boot-security-jwt
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides JWT authentication and authorization patterns for Spring Boot 3.5.x covering token generation with JJWT, Bearer/cookie authentication, database/OAuth2 integration, and RBAC/permission-based access control using Spring Security 6.x. Use when implementing authentication or authorization in Spring Boot applications.
description_zh: 一个全面、生产就绪的Spring Boot JWT安全实现，涵盖现代Spring Security 6.x模式，文档优秀且示例实用。
_original_description: A comprehensive, production-ready Spring Boot JWT security implementation covering modern Spring Security 6.x patterns with excellent documentation and practical examples.

name: spring-boot-test-patterns
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides comprehensive testing patterns for Spring Boot applications including unit, integration, slice, and container-based testing with JUnit 5, Mockito, Testcontainers, and performance optimization. Use when implementing robust test suites for Spring Boot applications.
description_zh: 一份全面且结构清晰的Spring Boot测试模式指南，涵盖单元测试、集成测试和切片测试，并整合了Testcontainers和JUnit 5等现代工具。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured guide to Spring Boot testing patterns covering unit, integration, and slice testing with modern tools like Testcontainers and JUnit 5.

name: spring-data-jpa
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides patterns to implement persistence layers with Spring Data JPA. Use when creating repositories, configuring entity relationships, writing queries (derived and @Query), setting up pagination, database auditing, transactions, UUID primary keys, multiple databases, and database indexing.
description_zh: 一个全面且结构清晰的Spring Data JPA持久层实现技能，包含清晰的示例、最佳实践，涵盖了审计、分页和事务等核心功能。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured Skill for implementing Spring Data JPA persistence layers with clear examples, best practices, and coverage of essential features like auditing, pagination, and transactions.

name: spring-data-neo4j
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides Spring Data Neo4j integration patterns for graph database development. Use when working with Neo4j graph databases, node entities, relationships, Cypher queries, reactive Neo4j operations, or Spring Data Neo4j repositories.
description_zh: 一份全面实用的Spring Data Neo4j集成指南，为图数据库开发提供了清晰的配置说明、实体映射模式、仓库实现和测试策略。
_original_description: A comprehensive and practical guide to Spring Data Neo4j integration, offering clear setup instructions, entity mapping patterns, repository implementations, and testing strategies for graph database development.

name: typescript-docs
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Generates comprehensive TypeScript documentation using JSDoc, TypeDoc, and multi-layered documentation patterns for different audiences. Use when creating API documentation, architectural decision records (ADRs), code examples, and framework-specific patterns for NestJS, Express, React, Angular, and Vue.
description_zh: 使用JSDoc与TypeDoc为TypeScript项目生成API、组件及架构决策的文档。提供React、Angular、NestJS等主流框架的模板，并包含CI/CD自动化流程，确保文档与代码同步。
_original_description: Generates TypeScript documentation for APIs, components, and architectural decisions using JSDoc and TypeDoc. Includes templates for frameworks like React, Angular, and NestJS, along with automation for CI/CD pipelines to keep docs in sync with code.

name: unit-test-application-events
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides patterns for testing Spring application events (ApplicationEvent) with @EventListener and ApplicationEventPublisher. Handles event publishing, listening, and async event handling in Spring Boot applications. Use when validating event-driven workflows in your Spring Boot services.
description_zh: 提供使用JUnit 5和Mockito测试Spring ApplicationEvent发布者和监听器的模式。涵盖事件发布验证、监听器调用测试、条件监听器和异步事件处理，包含实用代码示例。
_original_description: Provides patterns for testing Spring ApplicationEvent publishers and listeners using JUnit 5 and Mockito. Covers event publishing verification, listener invocation testing, conditional listeners, and async event handling with practical code examples.

name: unit-test-bean-validation
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides patterns for unit testing Jakarta Bean Validation (@Valid, @NotNull, @Min, @Max, etc.) with custom validators and constraint violations. Validates logic without Spring context. Use when ensuring data integrity and validation rules are correct.
description_zh: 一份结构清晰、实用性强的单元测试指南，全面覆盖了Jakarta Bean Validation的标准约束、自定义验证器及断言模式。
_original_description: A well-structured and practical guide for unit testing Jakarta Bean Validation with comprehensive examples covering standard constraints, custom validators, and proper assertion patterns.

name: unit-test-boundary-conditions
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Edge case and boundary testing patterns for unit tests. Testing minimum/maximum values, null cases, empty collections, and numeric precision. Pure JUnit 5 unit tests. Use when ensuring code handles limits and special cases correctly.
description_zh: 提供针对边界条件测试的JUnit 5具体模式，包括整数极值、空值输入、集合边界等。包含数值溢出、字符串空白、日期边界等代码示例，专注于系统性的边缘情况覆盖。
_original_description: Provides concrete JUnit 5 patterns for testing boundary conditions like integer limits, null/empty inputs, and collection edges. Includes code examples for numeric overflow, string whitespace, and date boundaries. Focuses on systematic edge case coverage rather than generic testing advice.

name: unit-test-caching
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides patterns for unit testing caching behavior using Spring Cache annotations (@Cacheable, @CachePut, @CacheEvict). Use when validating cache configuration and cache hit/miss scenarios.
description_zh: 提供针对Spring缓存注解（@Cacheable、@CacheEvict、@CachePut）的单元测试模式，无需完整的Spring上下文或外部缓存基础设施。展示如何使用内存CacheManager和Mockito验证缓存命中/未命中、失效、条件缓存和键生成。
_original_description: Provides unit testing patterns for Spring caching annotations (@Cacheable, @CacheEvict, @CachePut) without requiring full Spring context or external cache infrastructure. Shows how to verify cache hits/misses, invalidation, conditional caching, and key generation using in-memory CacheManager and Mockito.

name: unit-test-config-properties
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides patterns for unit testing @ConfigurationProperties classes with @ConfigurationPropertiesTest. Use when validating application configuration binding and validation.
description_zh: 一份全面且结构清晰的Spring Boot配置属性测试指南，包含绑定、验证、嵌套结构和环境配置的实用示例。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured guide for testing Spring Boot configuration properties with practical examples covering binding, validation, nested structures, and profile-specific configurations.

name: unit-test-controller-layer
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides patterns for unit testing REST controllers using MockMvc and @WebMvcTest. Validates request/response mapping, validation, and exception handling. Use when testing web layer endpoints in isolation.
description_zh: 该技能提供使用MockMvc测试Spring REST控制器的现成代码模式。涵盖GET、POST、PUT、DELETE端点、错误处理、请求参数和头信息。示例展示如何模拟服务依赖并验证HTTP响应，无需启动完整应用上下文。
_original_description: This skill provides ready-to-use code patterns for testing Spring REST controllers with MockMvc. It covers GET, POST, PUT, DELETE endpoints, error handling, request parameters, and headers. The examples show how to mock service dependencies and verify HTTP responses without starting the full application context.

name: unit-test-exception-handler
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides patterns for unit testing @ExceptionHandler and @ControllerAdvice for global exception handling. Use when validating error response formatting and HTTP status codes.
description_zh: 提供了测试Spring框架中@ExceptionHandler和@ControllerAdvice的单元测试模式。包含Maven/Gradle的配置说明、针对不同异常类型的实用示例，并使用MockMvc验证HTTP状态码和响应结构。
_original_description: Provides a clear pattern for unit testing Spring's @ExceptionHandler and @ControllerAdvice. Includes setup instructions for Maven/Gradle, practical examples for different exception types, and verifies HTTP status codes and response structure using MockMvc.

name: unit-test-json-serialization
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides patterns for unit testing JSON serialization/deserialization with Jackson and @JsonTest. Use when validating JSON mapping, custom serializers, and date format handling.
description_zh: 一份全面实用的JSON序列化/反序列化测试指南，使用Spring的@JsonTest，通过清晰的示例和最佳实践覆盖了常见场景。
_original_description: A comprehensive and practical guide for testing JSON serialization/deserialization using Spring's @JsonTest, covering common scenarios with clear examples and best practices.

name: unit-test-mapper-converter
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides patterns for unit testing mappers and converters (MapStruct, custom mappers). Validates object transformation logic in isolation. Use when ensuring correct data transformation between DTOs and domain objects.
description_zh: 一份全面且结构清晰的MapStruct映射器和自定义转换器单元测试指南，提供了清晰的模式、实用示例，并全面覆盖了常见的映射场景。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured guide for unit testing MapStruct mappers and custom converters, providing clear patterns, practical examples, and thorough coverage of common mapping scenarios.

name: unit-test-parameterized
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides parameterized testing patterns with @ParameterizedTest, @ValueSource, @CsvSource. Enables running a single test method with multiple input combinations. Use when testing multiple scenarios with similar logic.
description_zh: 一份全面且结构清晰的JUnit 5参数化测试指南，包含多种数据源类型的清晰示例和实用场景。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured guide to JUnit 5 parameterized testing with clear examples covering multiple data source types and practical use cases.

name: unit-test-scheduled-async
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides patterns for unit testing scheduled and async tasks using @Scheduled and @Async. Handles mocking task execution and timing. Use when validating asynchronous operations and scheduling behavior.
description_zh: 该技能为测试Java Spring的@Async和@Scheduled方法提供了一系列单元测试模式。展示了如何在不实际启动调度器的情况下，模拟任务执行、直接测试CompletableFuture结果、验证定时逻辑。包含错误处理示例和使用Awaitility验证异步行为的说明。
_original_description: This skill provides a pattern library for unit testing Java Spring's @Async and @Scheduled methods. It shows how to mock task executors, test CompletableFuture results directly, and verify cron logic without actually running a scheduler. Includes examples for error handling and using Awaitility for async verification.

name: unit-test-security-authorization
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides patterns for unit testing Spring Security with @PreAuthorize, @Secured, @RolesAllowed. Validates role-based access control and authorization policies. Use when testing security configurations and access control logic.
description_zh: 提供用于测试Spring Security授权注解（如@PreAuthorize和@Secured）的单元测试模板。包含基于角色的访问控制、MockMvc控制器测试和自定义权限评估器的示例。帮助开发者在无需完整Spring上下文的情况下验证安全逻辑。
_original_description: Provides ready-to-use unit test patterns for Spring Security authorization annotations like @PreAuthorize and @Secured. Includes examples for role-based access control, MockMvc controller tests, and custom permission evaluators. Helps developers verify security logic without full Spring context setup.

name: unit-test-service-layer
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides patterns for unit testing service layer with Mockito. Validates business logic in isolation by mocking dependencies. Use when testing service behaviors and business logic without database or external services.
description_zh: 该技能详细介绍了使用JUnit 5和Mockito为Spring服务层编写单元测试的模式。包含模拟依赖、验证交互、测试异常和复杂工作流的实用代码示例。文档提供了配置说明、常见模式和故障排除建议。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed patterns for writing unit tests for Spring service layer classes using JUnit 5 and Mockito. It covers mocking dependencies, verifying interactions, testing exceptions, and complex workflows with practical code examples. The documentation includes setup instructions, common patterns, and troubleshooting tips for Java developers.

name: unit-test-utility-methods
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides patterns for unit testing utility/helper classes and static methods. Validates pure functions and helper logic. Use when verifying utility code correctness.
description_zh: 一个全面且结构良好的JUnit 5单元测试指南，专门针对工具类和静态方法，涵盖了从基础到参数化测试的各种场景。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured guide for unit testing utility classes and static methods with JUnit 5, covering various scenarios from basic to parameterized testing.

name: unit-test-wiremock-rest-api
author: giuseppe-trisciuoglio
description: Provides patterns for unit testing external REST APIs using WireMock to mock HTTP endpoints. Use when testing service integrations with external APIs.
description_zh: 一个结构清晰的技能，用于使用WireMock进行REST API集成的单元测试，提供了实用的HTTP响应模拟和请求验证模式，包含最佳实践和示例。
_original_description: A well-structured skill for unit testing REST API integrations using WireMock, providing clear patterns for stubbing HTTP responses and verifying requests with practical examples and best practices.

name: api-generator
author: gizix
description: Generate complete CRUD API endpoints with async patterns, Pydantic validation, JWT authentication, and proper error handling. Activates when creating new API resources or routes.

name: component-patterns
author: gizix
description: Implement advanced React component patterns including compound components, render props, and composition patterns. Use when building flexible, reusable component APIs.

name: custom-hooks
author: gizix
description: Implement custom React hooks for reusable logic including state management, side effects, and data fetching. Use when extracting component logic into reusable hooks.

name: deployment-guide
author: gizix
description: Production deployment guidance for Quart applications including Docker, Hypercorn configuration, environment management, monitoring, and performance tuning. Activates when deploying or optimizing for production.

name: dialog-generator
author: gizix
description: Generate modal and modeless dialog windows for Tkinter applications. Use when creating dialogs, popups, or secondary windows, when user mentions "dialog", "popup", "modal", or when working with files in views/dialogs/ directory.

name: django-patterns
author: gizix
description: Implement common Django design patterns including managers, querysets, mixins, services, and architectural patterns. Use when refactoring code or implementing standard Django patterns.

name: drf-serializer
author: gizix
description: Generate Django REST Framework serializers with validation, nested relationships, and best practices. Use when creating or updating API serializers, especially for complex models with relationships.

name: form-validation
author: gizix
description: Add comprehensive form validation to Tkinter views using the template's validator utilities. Use when creating forms, handling user input, when user mentions "validation", "form", or when working with Entry/Text widgets.

name: model-validator
author: gizix
description: Add comprehensive validation to Django models using validators, clean methods, and constraints. Use when implementing model validation, business rules, or data integrity checks.

name: mvc-pattern
author: gizix
description: Scaffold new MVC components (Model, View, Controller) for Tkinter applications following the template's architecture. Use when creating new features, when user mentions "MVC", "model", "view", or "controller", or when working with .py files in models/, views/, or controllers/ directories.

name: pdf-splitter
author: gizix
description: Split PDF files into smaller files by pages, page ranges, or chunks. Use when working with .pdf files, when user asks to split/divide PDFs, extract pages, separate pages, or create individual PDF files from multi-page documents.

name: query-patterns
author: gizix
description: Implement TanStack Query (React Query) patterns for data fetching, caching, mutations, and optimistic updates. Use when setting up API integration or data fetching strategies.

name: spider-generator
author: gizix
description: Generate Scrapy spiders with best practices when creating new spiders, crawlers, or implementing scraping patterns. Automatically scaffolds spiders based on target website type and requirements.

name: test-helper
author: gizix
description: Generate comprehensive async pytest tests for Quart endpoints, database operations, and WebSocket connections. Activates when writing tests or ensuring code coverage.

name: meeting-intelligence-system
author: gked2121
description: Analyze meeting transcripts to extract decisions, action items, blockers, sentiment, and generate follow-up emails. Use when user provides meeting notes, transcripts, or recordings and needs structured summaries or action tracking.

name: brand-agency
author: glebis
description: Applies Agency brand colors and typography to artifacts including presentations, SVG graphics, documents, and web interfaces. This skill should be used when brand colors, visual formatting, neobrutalism style, or Agency design standards apply. Keywords - branding, corporate identity, visual identity, styling, brand colors, typography, visual formatting, visual design, neobrutalism.

name: chrome-history
author: glebis
description: Query Chrome browsing history with natural language. Filter by date range, article type, keywords, and specific sites.

name: decision-toolkit
author: glebis
description: Generate structured decision-making tools — step-by-step guides, bias checkers, scenario explorers, and interactive dashboards. Use when facing significant choices requiring systematic analysis. Supports multiple cognitive styles and output formats.

name: deep-research
author: glebis
description: This skill should be used when conducting comprehensive research on any topic using the OpenAI Deep Research API. It automates prompt enhancement through interactive clarifying questions, saves research parameters, and executes deep research with web search capabilities. Use when the user asks for in-depth analysis, investigation, research summaries, or topic exploration.

name: elevenlabs-tts
author: glebis
description: This skill converts text to high-quality audio files using ElevenLabs API. Use this skill when users request text-to-speech generation, audio narration, or voice synthesis with customizable voice parameters (stability, similarity boost) and voice presets (rachel, adam, bella, elli, josh, arnold, ava).

name: fathom
author: glebis
description: Fetch meetings, transcripts, summaries, and action items from Fathom API. Use when user asks to get Fathom recordings, sync meeting transcripts, or fetch recent calls.

name: firecrawl-research
author: glebis
description: This skill should be used when the user requests to research topics using FireCrawl, enrich notes with web sources, search and scrape information, or write scientific/academic papers. It extracts research topics from markdown files, creates research documents with scraped sources, generates BibTeX bibliographies from research results, and provides Pandoc/MyST templates for academic writing with citation management.

name: github-gist
author: glebis
description: Publish files or Obsidian notes as GitHub Gists. Use when user wants to share code/notes publicly, create quick shareable snippets, or publish markdown to GitHub. Triggers include "publish as gist", "create gist", "share on github", "make a gist from this".

name: gmail
author: glebis
description: This skill should be used when searching, fetching, or downloading emails from Gmail. Use for queries like "search Gmail for...", "find emails from John", "show unread emails", "emails about project X", or "download attachment from email".

name: google-image-search
author: glebis
description: Search and download images via Google Custom Search API with LLM-powered selection. This skill should be used when finding images for articles, presentations, research documents, or enriching Obsidian notes with relevant visuals. Supports simple queries, batch processing from JSON config, automatic config generation from terms, and full note enrichment with automatic image insertion below headings.

name: health-data
author: glebis
description: Query Apple Health SQLite database for vitals, activity, sleep, and workouts. Supports Markdown, JSON, and FHIR R4 output formats. This skill should be used when analyzing health metrics, generating health reports, answering questions about fitness or sleep patterns, or exporting health data in standard formats.

name: llm-cli
author: glebis
description: Process textual and multimedia files with various LLM providers using the llm CLI. Supports both non-interactive and interactive modes with model selection, config persistence, and file input handling.

name: pdf-generation
author: glebis
description: Professional PDF generation from markdown using Pandoc with Eisvogel template and EB Garamond fonts. Use when converting markdown to PDF, creating white papers, research documents, marketing materials, or technical documentation. Supports both English and Russian documents with professional typography and color-coded themes. Mobile-optimized layout (6x9) by default for Telegram bot context, desktop/print layout (A4) for other contexts.

name: telegram
author: glebis
description: This skill should be used when fetching, searching, downloading, sending, editing, or publishing messages on Telegram. Use for queries like "show my Telegram messages", "search Telegram for...", "get unread messages", "send a message to...", "edit that message", "publish this draft to klodkot", or "add Telegram messages to my notes".
_original_description: This skill should be used when fetching, searching, downloading, sending, or editing messages on Telegram. Use for queries like "show my Telegram messages", "search Telegram for...", "get unread messages", "send a message to...", "edit that message", or "add Telegram messages to my notes".

name: transcript-analyzer
author: glebis
description: This skill analyzes meeting transcripts to extract decisions, action items, opinions, questions, and terminology using Cerebras AI (llama-3.3-70b). Use this skill when the user asks to analyze a transcript, extract action items from meetings, find decisions in conversations, build glossaries from discussions, or summarize key points from recorded meetings.

name: youtube-transcript
author: glebis
description: Extract YouTube video transcripts with metadata and save as Markdown to Obsidian vault. Use this skill when the user requests downloading YouTube transcripts, converting YouTube videos to text, or extracting video subtitles. Does not download video/audio files, only metadata and subtitles.

name: zoom
author: glebis
description: Create and manage Zoom meetings and access cloud recordings via the Zoom API. Use for queries like "create a Zoom meeting", "list my Zoom meetings", "show my Zoom recordings", or "schedule a meeting for tomorrow".

name: aesthetic-dreaming
author: glittercowboy
description: Create aesthetic templates without first creating a plugin - capture visual design concepts through adaptive questioning. Use when you want to build a library of visual systems before plugin implementation.
description_zh: 通过迭代提问捕获视觉设计系统的结构化工作流技能，可在插件实现前创建美学模板，具有清晰的阶段化执行流程。
_original_description: A structured workflow skill for capturing visual design systems through iterative questioning, enabling creation of aesthetic templates before plugin implementation with clear phase-based execution.

name: build-iphone-apps
author: glittercowboy
description: Build professional native iPhone apps in Swift with SwiftUI and UIKit. Full lifecycle - build, debug, test, optimize, ship. CLI-only, no Xcode. Targets iOS 26 with iOS 18 compatibility.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一套通过命令行构建iPhone应用的完整工作流，绕过了Xcode图形界面。它强制要求在每次代码更改后执行严格的验证循环，并将功能正确性测试与主观UI评估分开。该方法将用户视为产品负责人，只关注结果而非代码细节。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured workflow for building iPhone apps entirely through CLI commands, bypassing Xcode's GUI. It enforces a strict verification loop after every code change and separates correctness testing from subjective UI evaluation. The approach treats the user as a product owner who judges outcomes rather than reviewing code.

name: build-macos-apps
author: glittercowboy
description: Build professional native macOS apps in Swift with SwiftUI and AppKit. Full lifecycle - build, debug, test, optimize, ship. CLI-only, no Xcode.
description_zh: 一个用于通过CLI工具（而非Xcode）构建macOS应用的结构化工作流。它强制要求在每次更改后执行严格的验证循环：构建、测试、启动。该技能将正确性（测试）与用户体验（用户审查）分离，并为不同的开发任务提供具体的工作流程。
_original_description: A structured workflow for building macOS apps using CLI tools instead of Xcode. It enforces a strict verification loop after every change: build, test, launch. The skill separates correctness (tests) from desirability (user review) and provides specific workflows for different development tasks.

name: context-resume
author: glittercowboy
description: Load plugin context from handoff files to resume work. Invoked by /continue command, 'resume [PluginName]', 'continue working on [PluginName]', 'pick up where I left off with [PluginName]', or 'show me where [PluginName] is at'. Locates handoff across 2 locations, parses state, presents summary, and routes to appropriate continuation skill.
description_zh: 一个用于插件开发工作流恢复的复杂编排技能，具有清晰的委托模式和全面的错误处理机制。
_original_description: A sophisticated workflow orchestration skill that provides robust context resumption for plugin development with clear delegation patterns and comprehensive error handling.

name: create-agent-skills
author: glittercowboy
description: Expert guidance for creating, writing, building, and refining Claude Code Skills. Use when working with SKILL.md files, authoring new skills, improving existing skills, or understanding skill structure and best practices.
description_zh: 该技能指导开发者如何创建Claude Skills，采用结构化路由模式。它清晰说明了如何组织SKILL.md文件、分离工作流与参考资料，以及使用XML标签而非Markdown标题。强调渐进式披露以保持提示词的可管理性。
_original_description: This skill teaches developers how to create Claude Skills using a structured router pattern. It provides clear guidance on organizing SKILL.md files, separating workflows from references, and using XML tags instead of markdown headings. The skill emphasizes progressive disclosure to keep prompts manageable.

name: create-hooks
author: glittercowboy
description: Expert guidance for creating, configuring, and using Claude Code hooks. Use when working with hooks, setting up event listeners, validating commands, automating workflows, adding notifications, or understanding hook types (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, etc).
description_zh: 提供创建和配置Claude Code钩子的完整指南，用于自动化工作流、校验命令和注入上下文。包含日志记录、安全拦截、自动格式化等具体示例，并涵盖调试方法和安全清单。
_original_description: Provides step-by-step guidance for implementing Claude Code hooks to automate workflows, validate commands, and inject context. Includes concrete examples for logging, security blocks, auto-formatting, and notifications with clear debugging and security considerations.

name: create-mcp-servers
author: glittercowboy
description: Create Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers that expose tools, resources, and prompts to Claude. Use when building custom integrations, APIs, data sources, or any server that Claude should interact with via the MCP protocol. Supports both TypeScript and Python implementations.

name: create-subagents
author: glittercowboy
description: Expert guidance for creating, building, and using Claude Code subagents and the Task tool. Use when working with subagents, setting up agent configurations, understanding how agents work, or using the Task tool to launch specialized agents.
description_zh: 该技能提供创建和管理Claude Code子代理的详细指南，涵盖文件结构、配置、提示词编写和多代理工作流设计。包含针对工具误用、约束失效等常见问题的故障排除方法。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed guidance for creating and managing Claude Code subagents. It covers file structure, configuration, prompt writing, and multi-agent workflow design. Includes troubleshooting for common issues like tool misuse and constraint violations.

name: debug-like-expert
author: glittercowboy
description: Deep analysis debugging mode for complex issues. Activates methodical investigation protocol with evidence gathering, hypothesis testing, and rigorous verification. Use when standard troubleshooting fails or when issues require systematic root cause analysis.
description_zh: 当标准故障排除失败时激活的系统化调试技能。提供差分调试、二分查找、可观测性优先等具体技术，针对不同错误场景提供具体示例。强调科学方法而非快速修复。
_original_description: A systematic debugging skill that activates when standard troubleshooting fails. It provides concrete techniques like differential debugging, binary search, and observability-first approaches with specific examples for different bug scenarios. The skill emphasizes scientific method over quick fixes.

name: deep-research
author: glittercowboy
description: Multi-agent parallel investigation for complex JUCE problems. Use when troubleshooting fails after Level 3, problems require novel research, or user requests /research command.
description_zh: 一个用于JUCE插件开发的复杂多层次研究系统，实现了分级调查协议和清晰的实施技能交接机制。
_original_description: A sophisticated multi-level research system for JUCE plugin development that implements graduated investigation protocols with clear handoff mechanisms to implementation skills.

name: plugin-improve
author: glittercowboy
description: Fix bugs, add features to completed plugins. Includes versioning, backups, regression testing, changelog automation. Auto-detects deep-research handoffs to preserve investigation context. Trigger terms - improve, fix, add feature, modify plugin, version bump, rollback
description_zh: 一个成熟的插件改进工作流，具备完整的版本控制、备份和测试协议，创新性地集成了深度研究交接检测和分层调查系统。
_original_description: A sophisticated plugin improvement workflow with comprehensive versioning, backup, and testing protocols. Features innovative deep-research handoff detection and tiered investigation system for systematic plugin maintenance.

name: plugin-lifecycle
author: glittercowboy
description: Manage complete plugin lifecycle - install, uninstall, reset, destroy. Use when user runs /install-plugin, /uninstall, /reset-to-ideation, /destroy, /clean commands, or says 'install [Name]', 'remove [Name]', 'uninstall [Name]', 'delete [Name]'.
description_zh: 在 macOS 上管理音频插件的完整生命周期，包括安装、卸载、重置到构思阶段和完全删除四种模式。处理系统文件夹部署、权限设置、缓存清理，并通过 PLUGINS.md 进行状态跟踪。提供交互式菜单并支持自动化工作流。
_original_description: Manages complete audio plugin lifecycle on macOS with four workflow modes: installation, uninstallation, reset to ideation, and destructive removal. Handles system folder deployment, permission management, cache clearing, and state tracking via PLUGINS.md. Provides interactive menu and supports automated workflows.

name: plugin-packaging
author: glittercowboy
description: Create branded PKG installers for plugin distribution. Use when user requests to package a plugin, create installer, share plugin with others, or mentions distributing/sending plugin to someone. Invoked by /package command or natural language like 'create installer for TapeAge' or 'package GainKnob'.
description_zh: 为音频插件创建macOS PKG安装程序，包含品牌界面、自动安装脚本和Gatekeeper绕过说明。支持VST3和AU格式，从项目文件提取元数据，生成完整的发行包和文档。
_original_description: Creates macOS PKG installers for audio plugins with branded UI, automated installation scripts, and Gatekeeper bypass instructions. Handles VST3 and AU plugin formats, extracts metadata from project files, and generates complete distribution packages with documentation.

name: plugin-planning
author: glittercowboy
description: Orchestrates Stage 0 research and planning for JUCE plugins - creates architecture.md and plan.md contracts through subagent delegation. Use when creative brief exists and plugin needs DSP architecture specification, complexity assessment, or implementation planning. Invoke via /plan command, natural language (plan architecture, research DSP), or as first implementation step.
description_zh: 通过委托子代理，自动化JUCE音频插件的第0阶段研究和规划。在验证创意简报和参数规范等前提条件后，生成架构文档和计划文档。规划完成后提供决策菜单指导后续步骤。
_original_description: Automates Stage 0 research and planning for JUCE audio plugins by delegating to a subagent. Creates architecture.md and plan.md contracts after validating preconditions like creative brief and parameter specs. Provides decision menu for next steps after planning completes.

name: plugin-testing
author: glittercowboy
description: Validates audio plugins through automated tests, pluginval, or manual DAW testing. Use for MANUAL testing via /test command. Note - Automatic validation now built into workflow (validation-agent runs after each stage). This skill is for manual testing only, after bug fixes, or when user mentions test, validate, validation, pluginval, stability, automated tests, run tests, check plugin, or quality assurance.
description_zh: 用于音频插件的测试技能，提供自动化测试、插件验证和手动DAW测试三种模式。它与工作流系统集成，记录测试结果，并将复杂故障分析委托给研究技能。
_original_description: A manual testing skill for audio plugins that provides three validation modes: automated unit tests, pluginval compliance checks, and manual DAW testing. It integrates with a larger workflow system, logs results, and delegates complex failure analysis to a research skill.

name: plugin-workflow
author: glittercowboy
description: Orchestrates JUCE plugin implementation through stages 1-3 (Foundation, DSP, GUI) using subagent delegation with automatic validation after each stage. Use when implementing plugins after planning completes, or when resuming with /continue command. Invoked by /implement command.
description_zh: 一个用于JUCE插件开发的复杂编排技能，通过结构化三阶段工作流协调多个专业子代理，具备自动验证和检查点管理功能。
_original_description: A sophisticated orchestration skill for JUCE plugin development that coordinates multiple specialized subagents through a structured 3-stage workflow with automatic validation and checkpoint management.

name: system-setup
author: glittercowboy
description: Validates and configures all dependencies required for the Plugin Freedom System. This is a STANDALONE skill that runs BEFORE plugin workflows begin. It checks for Python, build tools, CMake, JUCE, and pluginval, optionally installing missing dependencies with user approval. Configuration is saved to .claude/system-config.json for use by other skills. Use when user mentions setup, installation, dependencies, missing tools, or when SessionStart hook detects configuration issues.
description_zh: 为JUCE音频插件开发验证和配置依赖项。检查Python、构建工具、CMake、JUCE和pluginval，提供自动或手动安装选项。将配置保存到system-config.json供Plugin Freedom System中的其他技能使用。
_original_description: Validates and configures dependencies for JUCE audio plugin development. Checks for Python, build tools, CMake, JUCE, and pluginval with automated or guided installation options. Saves configuration to system-config.json for use by other skills in the Plugin Freedom System.

name: troubleshooting-docs
author: glittercowboy
description: Captures solved problems as categorized documentation with YAML frontmatter for fast lookup. Use when user confirms solution with phrases like 'that worked', 'it's fixed', 'working now', or via /doc-fix command.
description_zh: 当用户确认问题解决时，自动将已解决的技术问题捕获为带YAML前端的结构化Markdown文件。按症状类别组织，进行模式验证，并支持交叉引用，以构建可搜索的组织知识库。
_original_description: Automatically captures solved technical problems as structured markdown files with YAML frontmatter when users confirm fixes. Organizes by symptom categories, validates against schemas, and enables cross-referencing to build searchable institutional knowledge.

name: ui-mockup
author: glittercowboy
description: Orchestrator for WebView UI mockup workflow - delegates design iteration to ui-design-agent and implementation scaffolding to ui-finalization-agent. Use when user mentions UI design, mockup, WebView interface, or requests 'design UI for [plugin]'.
description_zh: 为音频插件创建WebView UI原型，通过分阶段工作流进行设计迭代和实现脚手架。委托给专用子代理，处理版本控制，并与现有插件开发流程集成。生成YAML规范、测试HTML和生产就绪的C++样板代码。
_original_description: Orchestrates WebView UI mockup creation for audio plugins through phased workflow with design iteration and implementation scaffolding. Delegates to specialized subagents, handles versioning, and integrates with existing plugin development workflows. Generates YAML specs, test HTML, and production-ready C++ boilerplate.

name: ui-template-library
author: glittercowboy
description: Manage aesthetic templates - save visual systems from completed mockups as interpretable prose, apply to new plugins with adaptive layouts
description_zh: 从HTML原型中提取视觉设计模式，转化为结构化文本描述，然后应用这些美学风格为不同插件生成自适应布局的新原型。提供美学模板库的增删改查管理功能。
_original_description: Captures visual design patterns from HTML mockups as structured prose descriptions, then applies those aesthetic 'vibes' to generate new mockups for different plugins with adaptive layouts. Manages a library of aesthetic templates with CRUD operations.

name: workflow-reconciliation
author: glittercowboy
description: Reconcile workflow state files to ensure checkpoints are properly updated. Use when state files are out of sync, after subagent completion without handoff, when switching workflows, or when user runs /reconcile command.
description_zh: 一个复杂的工作流协调工具，通过清晰的五阶段编排和健壮的错误处理，系统性地检测和修复插件开发工作流中的状态漂移。
_original_description: A sophisticated workflow reconciliation tool that systematically detects and fixes state drift in plugin development workflows with clear 5-phase orchestration and robust error handling.

name: moai-foundation-context
author: globalmsq
description: Enterprise context and session management with token budget optimization and state persistence

name: moai-foundation-core
author: globalmsq
description: MoAI-ADK's foundational principles - TRUST 5, SPEC-First DDD, delegation patterns, token optimization, progressive disclosure, modular architecture, agent catalog, command reference, and execution rules for building AI-powered development workflows

name: moai-foundation-quality
author: globalmsq
description: Enterprise code quality orchestrator with TRUST 5 validation, proactive analysis, and automated best practices enforcement

name: moai-library-shadcn
author: globalmsq
description: Moai Lib Shadcn Ui - Professional implementation guide

name: moai-workflow-templates
author: globalmsq
description: Enterprise template management with code boilerplates, feedback templates, and project optimization workflows

name: moai-workflow-testing
author: globalmsq
description: Comprehensive development workflow specialist combining DDD testing, debugging, performance optimization, code review, PR review, and quality assurance into unified development workflows

name: ai-sdk-6-skills
author: gocallum
description: AI SDK 6 Beta overview, agents, tool approval, Groq (Llama), and Vercel AI Gateway. Key breaking changes from v5 and new patterns.

name: authjs-skills
author: gocallum
description: Auth.js v5 setup for Next.js authentication including Google OAuth, credentials provider, environment configuration, and core API integration

name: clerk-nextjs-skills
author: gocallum
description: Clerk authentication for Next.js 16 (App Router only) with proxy.ts setup, migration from middleware.ts, environment configuration, and MCP server integration.

name: mcp-server-skills
author: gocallum
description: Pattern for building MCP servers in Next.js with mcp-handler, shared Zod schemas, and reusable server actions.

name: prd-mastery-context-aware-expert-driven-and-token-efficient-refinement
author: gocallum
description: A skill that blends the wisdom of top industry experts, ensures token-efficient PRDs, and organizes outputs in a clear folder structure.

name: prisma-orm-v7-skills
author: gocallum
description: Key facts and breaking changes for upgrading to Prisma ORM 7. Consider version 7 changes before generation or troubleshooting

name: resend-integration-skills
author: gocallum
description: Integrate Resend email service via MCP protocol for AI agents to send emails with Claude Desktop, GitHub Copilot, and Cursor. Set up transactional and marketing emails, configure sender verification, and use AI to automate email workflows.

name: upstash-vector-db-skills
author: gocallum
description: Upstash Vector DB setup, semantic search, namespaces, and embedding models (MixBread preferred). Use when building vector search features on Vercel.

name: code-reviewer
author: google-gemini
description: Use this skill to review code. It supports both local changes (staged or working tree) and remote Pull Requests (by ID or URL). It focuses on correctness, maintainability, and adherence to project standards.

name: greeter
author: google-gemini
description: A friendly greeter skill

name: pr-creator
author: google-gemini
description: Use this skill when asked to create a pull request (PR). It ensures all PRs follow the repository's established templates and standards.

name: skill-creator
author: google-gemini
description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Gemini CLI's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

name: design-md
author: google-labs-code
description: Analyze Stitch projects and synthesize a semantic design system into DESIGN.md files

name: react-components
author: google-labs-code
description: Converts Stitch designs into modular Vite and React components using system-level networking and AST-based validation.

name: git-branch-cleanup
author: gotalab
description:
Analyzes and safely cleans up local Git branches. Categorizes branches by merge status,
staleness, and remote tracking. Provides interactive selection with safety guards.
Use when the user wants to clean up branches, delete old branches, organize Git branches,
or asks about which branches can be safely deleted.

name: skill-evaluator
author: gotalab
description: Evaluates agent skills against Anthropic's best practices. Use when asked to review, evaluate, assess, or audit a skill for quality. Analyzes SKILL.md structure, naming conventions, description quality, content organization, and identifies anti-patterns. Produces actionable improvement recommendations.
